title: In a duplicated board- replies to comments are all listed as the first commentator

posts.author: YaelRot (Yael Rothschild)
posts.cookedHtml:
I duplicated a 2025 Projects board and named the 2026 board 2026 Projects.

I included all the updates in the duplication.

But in the 2026 board, all the replies to a comment are listed as being from the original commentator, as if they’re talking to themsleves.

This problem persists when I duplicate the board again.

Is there a way to undo this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you duplicate it with an automation/API? OR just with the three dots on the board with a ‘standard’ duplicate?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: YaelRot (Yael Rothschild)
posts.cookedHtml:
I did a standard duplicate with the three dots but it also included automations that I had in the 2025 board. The same ones exist on the 2026 board.

Anything specific I should look at?
